title: bellonia aspera
intro: Bellonia aspera is a plant species native to Central and South America, known for its thorny stems and small white flowers. Traditionally, the leaves and stems of this plant have been used in herbal medicine, particularly for their anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Bellonia aspera include wound healing, fever reduction, and relief from pain and swelling. The plant's leaves and stems can be prepared as a tea or infusion, while the roots are sometimes used to make a decoction for medicinal purposes.
